top_signals.summary: FedEx Sees Profit Gain While Warning on Inflation, Trade Turmoil  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UAE's exit from OPEC+ reduced the group's share of crude oil production and capacity
top_signals.summary: On April 28, 2026, the United Arab Emirates (UAE) announced that it was leaving OPEC, effective on May 1. OPEC was formed in 1960 by Iraq, Iran, Kuwait, Saudi Arabia, and Venezuela, with the stated objective to "coordinate and unify petroleum policies among Member Countries." OPEC is best known for its effect on global crude oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Nvidia’s banned AI chips double in price on China’s black market
top_signals.summary: US crackdown on illicit exports has made it riskier, harder and more expensive to buy tech giant’s processors
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Army tests fire control software that helps moving vehicles kill drones
top_signals.summary: The Army has successfully tested software designed to help vehicle-mounted weapons shoot down drones while both the target and the vehicle are moving.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chinese Premier Says Tech Industry Not a Global Threat | The China Show 6/24/2026
top_signals.summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: India Offers Leverage on Forex Deposits to Boost Inflows
top_signals.summary: India’s central bank allowed lenders to extend loans against foreign-currency deposits raised under a special program offered to overseas citizens, a move that could see billions in dollar inflows over the next few months.

top_signals.summary: SpaceX raised $25 billion in a debt sale, after seeing nearly $90 billion worth of orders, sources say.

alerts.title: Two Scattered Spider members plead guilty over cyberattack that crippled London transit
alerts.summary: A 20-year-old and an 18-year-old admitted to infiltrating the network of Transport for London in 2024, disrupting public transportation services for months.
